TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Peter_M_Christian, title = Peter_M_Christian, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Peter_M_Christian} }

S.FORM: Peter M. Christian I 1947 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 16 a romi'ad masofoc ci Peter M. Christian, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Micronesia anini i ci Peter M. Christian, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 11 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: p…ôt…ôr m. ¶ńßristian i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i p…ôt…ôr m. ¶ńßristian, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u mi ¶ro~un…ôsia anini i ¶i p…ôt…ôr m. ¶ńßristian, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Peter M. Christian I 1947 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 16 a romi'ad masofoc ci Peter M. Christian, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Micronesia anini i ci Peter M. Christian, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 11 a romi'ad.
